title: At the juntada
setting: You arrive at a house party full of Roberto's friends. The music's loud and everyone's in full casual mode.

steps.speaker: Beto
steps.es: ¡Ideay, chele! Pensábamos que ya no venías.
steps.en: Hey, foreigner! We thought you weren't coming.

options.es: ¡Aquí ando, pues! No me lo iba a perder.
options.en: Here I am! I wasn't gonna miss it.
options.feedback: Natural and warm — 'aquí ando, pues' is exactly the right casual energy.

options.en: Excuse my lateness, there was traffic.
options.feedback: A bit formal for a house party. Loosen up — nobody's clocking you here.
Flat. The party's lively — bring some of that energy in with you!

steps.speaker: Beto
steps.es: ¡Eso! Agarrá una birra. ¿Cómo va todo, maje?
steps.en: There you go! Grab a beer. How's everything, dude?

options.en: Everything's awesome, dude. What a great vibe!
options.feedback: Slang nailed — 'deacachimba' and complimenting the 'ambiente' fit perfectly.
Sounds like a business meeting! Match the party energy — keep it loose.
Easy and upbeat. Works great in the moment.

steps.speaker: Beto
steps.es: Más al rato ponemos música pa' bailar. ¿Le entrás?
steps.en: Later we'll put on music to dance. You in?

options.en: Of course! Even though I dance kinda clumsy, haha.
options.feedback: Game and self-deprecating — 'chambón' (clumsy) is great slang. They'll love it.

options.es: Le entro, pero me enseñás los pasos.
options.en: I'm in, but you teach me the moves.
options.feedback: Enthusiastic and inviting them to include you. Perfect party spirit.
Flat refusal at a party shuts the door. Even 'I'm bad but I'll try' keeps you in the fun.

steps.speaker: Beto
steps.es: ¡Jajaja, este chele es lo máximo! Ya sos de la familia.
steps.en: Hahaha, this foreigner is the best! You're family now.

options.es: ¡Eso, maje! Gracias por hacerme sentir así.
options.en: Yeah, dude! Thanks for making me feel that way.
options.feedback: Warm and genuine while keeping the casual tone. A perfect blend.
Beautiful — a little idiomatic wisdom dropped casually. That's fluency with heart.
Deflecting the warmth feels a bit cold. Just receive the love — they mean it.
